title: MEKAPLUS
description: Engineering Modpack including create, ae2, and mekanism
body:
![MEKAPLUS Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1efd6ea082d13903f319ba05f71ae654cf144bdd.png)
# **MEKAPLUS: The Ultimate Engineering Modpack**

MEKAPLUS is a comprehensive engineering modpack built on Forge 1.20.1 that pushes Minecraft's technological possibilities to their absolute limits. This modpack centers around three massive tech mods—Create, Applied Energistics 2 (AE2), and Mekanism—offering players an experience that transcends simple automation and delivers the opportunity to build a true industrial empire.

## **Create: Where Mechanical Romance Begins**

Create serves as the backbone of MEKAPLUS from the early to mid-game stages. Unlike traditional Minecraft mods that rely on magical energy or complex power systems, Create introduces an intuitive concept: Rotational Force.
Watching water wheels turn slowly to power millstones, steam engines with pistons rhythmically driving massive gear systems—it all evokes the atmosphere of an Industrial Revolution-era factory. Belt conveyors transporting resources, mechanical presses stamping out metal sheets, and automated assembly lines producing complex components piece by piece create a process that's not just efficient but visually stunning.
The true charm of Create lies in its infinite creativity. Players aren't simply following recipes; they're designing and implementing their own unique automation systems. Balancing rotational speed and stress, calculating gear ratios, and creating sophisticated control systems with clutches and gearboxes captures the genuine joy of engineering. You can build anything from simple grain mills to massive automated factories, each with your personal touch and design philosophy.
The mod encourages experimentation and problem-solving. Should you use a large water wheel for consistent power or multiple smaller ones for flexibility? How do you distribute rotational force efficiently across a large factory? These questions have no single right answer, making every player's builds unique and personal.

## **Applied Energistics 2: The Digital Revolution**

As you transition into the mid-game, AE2 introduces an entirely new dimension to your gameplay. If Create represents mechanical automation, AE2 embodies the smart logistics systems of the digital age.
The ME Network isn't just a storage system—it's a revolutionary way to manage your entire base. Thousands upon thousands of items organized in a single unified system, instantly searchable, with autocrafting capabilities that can handle the most complex production chains imaginable. Setting up pattern terminals to automate crafting recipes, designing efficient subnet architectures, and optimizing channel distribution becomes its own mini-game within the modpack.
AE2 transforms your base from a collection of individual machines into an integrated smart factory. Need 500 advanced circuits? Just request them, and the system automatically crafts all prerequisite components, pulling from storage or crafting them on-demand. The spatial storage system lets you literally move entire sections of your base, while wireless terminals allow you to access your entire storage network from anywhere.
The learning curve is steep, but mastering AE2 is incredibly rewarding. Understanding P2P tunnels for channel management, setting up efficient autocrafting with molecular assemblers, and designing storage systems that scale gracefully as your needs grow—these challenges appeal to players who love optimization and system design.

## **Mekanism: Industrial Power Unleashed**

In the late game, Mekanism elevates everything to an unprecedented scale. This mod represents the pinnacle of industrial processing, offering ore quintupling, digital mining systems, and power generation that dwarfs everything that came before.
The ore processing chain alone is a marvel of engineering. Starting with raw ore, you can process it through increasingly complex refinement stages—enrichment, crushing, purification, chemical injection—each step multiplying your output. By the time you've set up the full five-times ore processing, you're no longer worrying about resource scarcity; you're managing industrial-scale production.
Mekanism's Digital Miner is a game-changer. Instead of strip-mining or quarrying, you configure filters to extract exactly what you need from massive areas, leaving everything else untouched. Combined with Quantum Entangloporters for wireless item, fluid, and energy transfer, you can set up remote mining operations that feed directly into your main base processing systems.
The power systems scale to match these demands. From simple heat generators to massive fusion reactors producing billions of RF per tick, Mekanism ensures you'll never lack the energy to fuel your ambitions. The Induction Matrix allows you to store enormous amounts of power, buffering against demand spikes and ensuring your factory never goes dark.

## **The Perfect Synergy**

What makes MEKAPLUS truly special is how these three mods complement each other. Create handles the physical movement and processing of materials with its mechanical systems. AE2 manages the logistics, ensuring everything goes where it needs to go. Mekanism provides the raw industrial power and advanced processing capabilities to support massive operations.
Imagine this: Your Create-powered farms harvest crops automatically, sorting and processing them through mechanical belts and deployers. These materials feed into your AE2 network, which intelligently manages inventory and triggers autocrafting as needed. The crafted components flow into Mekanism machines for advanced processing, with the finished products stored back in the ME system, ready for whatever project you're tackling next.
You might use Create's precision mechanisms to build a beautiful, visible factory floor while AE2 handles the hidden logistics layer beneath, and Mekanism's chemical processing plants produce the advanced materials that fuel your most ambitious projects. Each mod handles what it does best, creating a cohesive whole greater than the sum of its parts.

## **Beyond the Big Three**

While Create, AE2, and Mekanism form the core, MEKAPLUS likely includes supporting mods that enhance the experience. Quality-of-life improvements, additional decoration blocks for factory building, tools for better world interaction, and perhaps even mods that add new challenges or goals to work toward.
The modpack progression naturally flows from manual labor to mechanical automation, then to digital logistics, and finally to industrial-scale mass production. Each stage builds on the last, and you're never left wondering what to do next. There's always a new milestone to reach, a more efficient design to implement, or a grander project to undertake.
The Engineering Journey
MEKAPLUS isn't just about reaching some end goal—it's about the journey of building, optimizing, and expanding your industrial empire. It appeals to players who find satisfaction in solving complex logistical puzzles, who take pride in clean cable management and efficient layouts, who stay up late tweaking their systems to squeeze out just a bit more efficiency.
Whether you're a Create enthusiast who loves the aesthetic of visible machinery, an AE2 expert who thrives on network optimization, or a Mekanism veteran ready to build fusion reactors, MEKAPLUS brings all these experiences together in one cohesive package. It's a modpack where every player can find their niche, where collaboration in multiplayer leads to spectacular mega-bases, and where there's always something new to learn and master.
This is engineering in Minecraft at its finest—complex enough to challenge, rewarding enough to satisfy, and open-ended enough that no two players' journeys will ever be quite the same.
